summary: REQ-5 is largely implemented by setting ledgerCanisterId values for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC in frontend/src/config/tokens.ts (ckETH matches the specified ID). However, the diff summary provides no direct evidence of the Dashboard UI warning/message behavior change. Two additional files (frontend-file-summaries.txt and project_state.json) were modified without being requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: On the Dashboard Tokens section, the “Not configured” warning no longer appears for ckBTC, ckETH, or ckUSDC send panels, and the send form renders for all three tokens.
missing_requirements.reason: Only token configuration changes are shown. No dashboard/UI component changes are included in the diff summary to demonstrate removal of the warning or ensuring the send form renders.

hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest; requirement is limited to configuring token ledger canister IDs (and associated UI behavior), with constraints focused on specific frontend files.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified project_state.json to reflect new feature requests/status and summary text.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest; appears to be internal tracking/metadata rather than implementing REQ-5.
